chunks.text: c ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-74 of 2016 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.12.2017. 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on maintainabilitv. Mr. Mohammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for petitioner. Mr. IVlunawar Ali Abbasi, Asst. A.G. Learned Counsel for the petitioner states that under instructions he does not press prayer clauses (a) & (d) and seeks disposal of this petition by directing the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. ' Accordingly, this petition stands dismissed so far reliefs claimed under prayer clauses (a) & (d) are concerned; however, in respect of prayer clauses (b) & (c), this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE t
